full_text:
Ma Yuan (Wenyuan) 馬援 (文淵)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Yuan (馬援), styledWenyuan (文淵). General of the Han who campaigned against the Vietnamese. Ma Teng was descended from him. Ma Yuan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Ma Yuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
